title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. polysteleum
intro:
Hieracium nigrescens subsp. polysteleum, also known as Polystele hawkweed, is a subspecies of perennial plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. polysteleum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
